title: Node
description: Node: 0D finite element for environmental analysis. Node class contains positional information and is used to build AnalysisGrids and provide links between model geometry and analytical results.

Position.description: Position of the node in global Cartesian 3D space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

ID.description: An ID for this node to identify it within result lists and on an analysis grid. ID should be unique and not shared with other nodes in the same grid.

Results.description: A list of TimeIndexResults for nodes with time dependent results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
